understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to move selectable pieces to goal positions marked with '+' on the semantic grid. The level required coordinating movement of multiple selectable pieces to reach their respective goal positions within a limited step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT) shift the currently selected piece by 3 pixels in that direction. CLICK with a target_position switches control to another selectable piece at that location. Walls ('#') block movement in certain directions. Blocks ('B') are pushable objects that move along with the selected piece if adjacent in the movement direction. The heuristic hints (movement.{direction}_blocked) indicate if adjacent objects exist but don't guarantee action failure. The grid uses 3 pixels per cell, so positions are given in pixel coordinates matching the player.position and objects lists, not cell indices.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to move selectable pieces to goal positions marked with '+' on the semantic grid. The level required coordinating movement of multiple selectable pieces to reach their respective goal positions within a limited step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT) shift the currently selected piece by 3 pixels in that direction. CLICK with a target_position switches control to another selectable piece at that location. Walls ('#') block movement in certain directions. Blocks ('B') are pushable objects that move along with the selected piece if adjacent in the movement direction. The heuristic hints (movement.{direction}_blocked) indicate if adjacent objects exist but don't guarantee action failure. The grid uses 3 pixels per cell, so positions are given in pixel coordinates matching the player.position and objects lists, not cell indices.
